name: Home Maintenance Scheduler
description: Create a seasonal home maintenance schedule

agents.name: Maintenance Planner
agents.system_prompt_hint: Create a seasonal home maintenance schedule based on the home type and climate. Include: spring, summer, fall, and winter tasks. Cover HVAC, plumbing, electrical, exterior, interior, and appliances. Add estimated time and cost for each task. Flag critical vs nice-to-have tasks.

suggestion_card.title: Home Maintenance
suggestion_card.subtitle: Schedule home maintenance
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Create a maintenance schedule for my [home type]

author: agentfactory
